## Checklist
Please verify the following before submitting:
- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Ruff passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Documentation updated to reflect changes
- [ ] No generated files, logs, or outputs committed
- [ ] Security impact considered (path traversal, size limits)
